hooks.command: printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"MANDATORY WORKFLOW — never skip or reorder: (1) Read the artifact first (commit, file, error, PR). (2) Identify and invoke the relevant skill via the Skill tool BEFORE forming any answer or plan — even when the answer seems obvious. (3) Only then answer using the skill context. Skipping step 2 is not allowed."}}'
